architectural_constraint: Python 3.12-slim base images. Pydantic models must match the handshake/signal protocol from 03_callosum.mdc. RH Planner is a persistent FastAPI service. LH Executor is ephemeral (entrypoint-driven). Multi-stage Dockerfiles for minimal image size.
acceptance_criteria: LH Executor processes task payloads and emits completion status
No secrets or credentials in images
